# test fixtures

This tree is the placeholder fixture surface for the first v0 compatibility and
differential suites.

Subtrees:

- `canaries/` — per-canary fixture directories matching `canaries/manifest.v0.json`
- `differential/` — read and write parity corpora for real-Postgres comparison

The current files are placeholders only. They exist so the repo has a stable
layout before the live runtime work begins.
